task_description: Implement maximum size constraints on markdown cards to prevent them from growing too large on the canvas. Cards should auto-size naturally for small content but cap at A4-equivalent dimensions (approx 600px width, 800px height). Content exceeding the max height scrolls internally.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds. No test framework configured in this project so test_quality is skipped. Docker build skipped (no Dockerfile). All changes verified by code inspection: MAX_CARD_WIDTH/MAX_CARD_HEIGHT constants defined, getNodeDimensions returns capped width and height, card container enforces maxHeight with overflow hidden, content area scrolls internally, custom-scrollbar CSS added, word-break rules prevent horizontal overflow.
